stemHtml: F-GTPO is out of radio-range of Lille Approach. Lille Approach has asked Bigjet 347 to relay F-GTPO`s transfer of communications to the Paris Area Control Centre on 128.055 MHz. What is the message of Bigjet 347?

options.a: “Bigjet 347 relaying Lille Approach for F-GTPO, contact Paris Control 128.05”
options.b: “Bigjet 347 relaying Lille Approach for F-GTPO, call Paris Control 128.055”
options.c: “F-GTPO, Bigjet 347, Lille Approach requests you to call 128.055”
options.d: “F-GTPO, Bigjet 347, Lille Approach requests you to contact Paris Control 128.055”
